# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:latest as base

RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates && \
    apk --no-cache add curl openssl wget gcc musl-dev make linux-headers \
    && ln -snf /usr/src/linux-headers/$($uname -r) /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-musl/libc-headers

WORKDIR /app

COPY . /app

RUN wget https://dl.postgresql.org/dc/latest/noarch/pgdg-centos10-repo-latest.x86_64.rpm \
    && sudo dnf install -y --noconfirm pgdg-centos10-repo \
    && rm pgdg-centos10-repo-latest.x86_64.rpm \
    && echo "server = /var/www/html" >> /etc/pg_hba.conf \
    && dnf install -y --noconfirm postgresql15 postgresql15-contrib \
    && addgroup -S app && adduser -S app -G app

RUN wget https://download.redis.io/redis-stable.tar.gz \
    && tar zxf redis-stable.tar.gz \
    && cd redis-stable && make \
    && mkdir /data/redis && chown -R app:app /data/redis \
    && mv src/redis-server /usr/local/bin/redis-server \
    && cp utils/redis.conf /etc/ \
    && sed -i 'daemonize yes' /etc/redis.conf \
    && sed -i 'bind 127.0.0.1' /etc/redis.conf \
    && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/redis-server \
    && rm -rf redis-stable

WORKDIR /app/web_server
RUN apk add --no-cache openjdk11:11-jdk openssl
COPY web_server.jar .
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["java", "-jar", "web_server.jar"]

WORKDIR /app/api_server
RUN apk add --no-cache openjdk11:11-jdk openssl
COPY api_server.jar .
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["java", "-jar", "api_server.jar"]

FROM alpine:latest as db

RUN apk add --no-cache postgresql15 postgresql15-contrib
ENV POSTGRES_USER=myuser \
    POSTGRES_PASSWORD=mypassword \
    DBNAME=mydb

CMD ["initdb", "-D", "/var/lib/postgresql/data"] && \
    pg_ctl -D /var/lib/postgresql/data -l logfile start

FROM redis:latest
EXPOSE 6379
